# Hardware reference snapshots

Read-only snapshots of the hardware schematic, mirrored here for build context completeness.

**Canonical source (planned):** `rnd-southerniot/rak3112-rs485-node-hw` at `~/Developer/projects/pcb-design/rak3112-rs485-node-hw/`.

**Do not edit anything in this tree.** Edits to schematic, PCB, BOM, or hardware ADRs happen in the hardware repo. Each tagged hardware revision drops a new versioned snapshot here (`schematic/v1.0/`, `schematic/v1.1/`, etc.) plus an updated entry in [`../HARDWARE_REV.md`](../HARDWARE_REV.md).
